resource_key.description: The key under which the DuckDB resource is registered.

database.description: DuckDB database path. Use ':memory:' for in-memory.

description: Register a DuckDB resource for fast in-process analytical queries
name: DuckDB Resource

quack_remote.label: Quack Remote
quack_remote.description: Optional Quack client mode. Format: 'quack:host' or 'quack:host:port'. When set, the resource installs+loads the 'quack' extension, creates a SECRET with quack_token, and ATTACHes the remote as quack_attach_as on each connection. Solves DuckDB's concurrent-write limitation by routing writes through a remote server.

quack_token.label: Quack Token
quack_token.description: Auth token for the remote Quack server. Use env-var reference: "{{ env('QUACK_TOKEN') }}".

quack_attach_as.label: Quack Attach As
quack_attach_as.description: Name under which the remote Quack database is ATTACHed.

quack_extension_repo.label: Quack Extension Repo
quack_extension_repo.description: Repo to install the 'quack' extension from. Use 'core_nightly' until the extension stabilizes.

quack_use_remote_by_default.label: Quack Use Remote By Default
quack_use_remote_by_default.description: If true, runs USE <attach_as> after attach so unqualified table names resolve to the remote.
